heading: Wind Cave National Game Preserve transferred to park
label: 141b Wind Cave National Game Preserve transferred to park
text: Effective , the Wind Cave National Game Preserve in the State of South Dakota is abolished, and all the property, real or personal, comprising the same is transferred to and made a part of the Wind Cave National Park and the same shall be administered by the Secretary of the Interior as a part of said park, subject to all laws and regulations applicable thereto, for the purposes expressed in , establishing said game preserve.July 1, 1935section 672 of this title
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was omitted from the Code.Section 672 of this title
